name: xenforo-notice
comment: XenForo's built-in dismissible cookie notice. Targets the bottom_fixer notice that contains cookie-related text and clicks its dismiss link, which removes the notice and sets the xf_notice_dismiss cookie.

detectCmp.exists: xpath///*[contains(@class, 'js-notices') and contains(@class, 'notices--bottom_fixer')]//li[contains(@class, 'js-notice')][contains(., 'cookie') or contains(., 'Cookie') or contains(., 'COOKIE')]//*[contains(@class, 'js-noticeDismiss') or contains(@class, 'notice-dismiss')]

detectPopup.visible: xpath///*[contains(@class, 'js-notices') and contains(@class, 'notices--bottom_fixer')]//li[contains(@class, 'js-notice')][contains(., 'cookie') or contains(., 'Cookie') or contains(., 'COOKIE')]

optOut.click: xpath///*[contains(@class, 'js-notices') and contains(@class, 'notices--bottom_fixer')]//li[contains(@class, 'js-notice')][contains(., 'cookie') or contains(., 'Cookie') or contains(., 'COOKIE')]//*[contains(@class, 'js-noticeDismiss') or contains(@class, 'notice-dismiss')]
